nasb.text: One basket had very good figs, like first-ripe figs, and the other basket had very bad figs which could not be eaten due to rottenness.

esv.text: One basket had very good figs, like first-ripe figs, but the other basket had very bad figs, so bad that they could not be eaten.

cnv.text: 一筐是極好的無花果，像初熟的無花果；另一筐是極壞的無花果，壞到不能吃。

ccb.text: 一筐无花果极好，好像初熟的果子；另一筐则坏得不能吃。
